revision.comment: /* Basic information */ Why this number isn't so useful
revision.text:
{{Short description|Wikipedia information page}} {{pp-move-indef|small=yes}} '''Page information''' shows information about a page on Wikipedia. A link to "Page information" is in the Tools panel of the sidebar. On the mobile site, first click "Desktop" at the bottom, or add ?action=info to the URL. Registered users can also enable [[mw:Reading/Web/Advanced mobile contributions|advanced mode]] in [[Special:MobileOptions|mobile settings]] and then click on three dots. Some of the below fields only appear for pages where relevant information is available. ==Basic information== {| class="wikitable" |- ! Field !! Explanation !! Example for {{plain link|{{fullurl:Wikipedia:Sandbox|action=info}}|Wikipedia:Sandbox}} |- |[[WP:DISPLAYTITLE|Display title]] || See [[WP:DISPLAYTITLE]] || Wikipedia:Sandbox |- |[[Help:Defaultsort|Default sort key]] || See [[Help:Defaultsort]] || Sandbox |- |Page length (in bytes) || Size of page content (source text without [[Wikipedia:Transclusion|transclusions]]) in [[byte]]s || 440 |- |[[Wikipedia:Namespace#Programming|Namespace ID]] || The [[Wikipedia:Namespace#Programming|namespace number]] of the page || 4 |- |[[WP:Namespace|Namespace]] || Which [[WP:Namespace|namespace]] the page is in (omitted for articles) || Wikipedia |- |[[mw:Page id|Page ID]] || See [[mw:Page id]] || 16283969 |- |[[mw:Page content language|Page content language]] || See [[mw:Page content language]] || en - English |- |[[mw:Manual:ContentHandler|Page content model]] || Type of content (eg. wiki content, or program code like [[CSS]] or [[JavaScript]]).
See also [[mw:Manual:ContentHandler]] || wikitext |- |[[WP:NOINDEX|Indexing by robots]] || See [[WP:NOINDEX]]. || Allowed |- |[[Help:Watchlist|Number of page watchers]] || See [[Help:Watchlist#watchers]]. Precise number only given if above 30 (for security reasons). This count includes all accounts (blocked, inactive, etc.). || 18,081 |- |Number of page watchers who visited recent edits || Number of watchers who have visited any revision made [[mw:Manual:$wgWatchersMaxAge|30 days]] or less earlier than the most recent one. || 333 |- |colspan=2| Number of [[Help:Redirect|redirects]] to this page || 43 |- |[[:mw:Manual:$wgContentNamespaces|Counted as a content page]] || This says "Yes" for [[WP:MAINSPACE|mainspace]] pages (excluding redirects) and is omitted for other pages || |- |colspan=2|Number of [[Help:subpages|subpages]] of this page || 14 (8 redirects; 6 non-redirects) |- | [[Wikipedia:Pageview statistics|Page views]] in the past 30 days || {{plain link|url=https://pageviews.toolforge.org/?project=en.wikipedia.org|name=Page view statistics}} under "External tools" at the bottom is more detailed || 24,100 |- |colspan=2|[[Wikipedia:Wikidata|Wikidata]] item ID || [[wikidata:Q3938|Q3938]] |- |[[Wikipedia:Short description|Local description]] || Description on the local wiki (the English Wikipedia) || |- |[[:wikidata:Help:Description|Central description]] || Description on [[Wikipedia:Wikidata|Wikidata]] || page intended for test edits |- |[[:mw:Extension:PageImages|Page image]] || Image automatically selected by [[:mw:Extension:PageImages#Image choice]] to represent the page. Not always present. || [[File:Example.jpg|220px]] |} == Page protection == {| class="wikitable" |- ! Field !! Explanation !! Example for {{plain link|{{fullurl:Wikipedia:Sandbox|action=info}}|Wikipedia:Sandbox}} |- |[[WP:Protection policy|Edit]] || If the page is protected, this indicates what authorisation level is required for making changes. || ''Allow all users (no expiry set)'' |- |[[WP:Protection policy#Move protection|Move]] || If the page is protected, this indicates what authorisation level is required for moving (or renaming) the page. || ''Allow all users (no expiry set)'' |} == Edit history == {| class="wikitable" |- ! Field !! Explanation !! Example for {{plain link|{{fullurl:Wikipedia:Sandbox|action=info}}|Wikipedia:Sandbox}} |- |[[Wikipedia:How to create a page|Page creator]] || First user in the [[Help:Page history|page history]] || [[Wikipedia:User pages|Username]] ([[Help:Using talk pages|talk]] | [[Help:User contributions|contribs]]) |- |Date of page creation || Time is in [[UTC]]. Registered users may [[Help:Preferences#Time offset|set a time zone]]. || 01:44, 2 January 2006 |- |[[Help:Page history|Latest editor]] || || [[Wikipedia:User pages|Username]] ([[Help:Using talk pages|talk]] | [[Help:User contributions|contribs]]) |- |Date of latest edit || Time is in [[UTC]] || 04:09, 13 December 2015 |- |Total number of edits || || 670,900 |- |Recent number of edits (within past 30 days) || || 800 |- |Recent number of distinct authors || || 300 |} == Page properties == {| class="wikitable" |- ! Field !! Explanation !! Example for {{plain link|{{fullurl:Wikipedia:Sandbox|action=info}}|Wikipedia:Sandbox}} |- |[[Help:Magic words#Behavior switches|Magic words]] || If the page uses any behaviour switches, they are shown here | ''(None)'' |- ||[[WP:HIDDENCAT|Hidden categories]] || If the page is part of any hidden categories, they are shown here || ''(None)'' |- style="vertical-align: top;" |[[Wikipedia:Transclusion|Transcluded]] templates || Shows transcluded pages in all namespaces, not just [[Help:Template|templates]]. This list may be incomplete. For a complete list, click the "Edit" or "View source" tab and see "Pages transcluded onto the current version of this page" at the bottom | * [[Help:Template|Template]]:Also (edit) ([[WP:SEMI|semi-protected]]) * Template:See also (view source) ([[WP:TEMP-PRO|template protected]]) * [[Help:Module|Module]]:Arguments (view source) (template protected) * Module:Hatnote (view source) (template protected) * Module:See also (view source) (template protected) * Module:TableTools (view source) (template protected) |- style="vertical-align: top;" |[[wikidata:Wikidata:Glossary#Entity|Wikidata entities]] |Which [[WP:Wikidata|Wikidata]] entities were used to generate the page (usually by an [[Help:Infobox|infobox]] or other templates) | * Entity used in this page ** List of properties of those entities used in this page |} == Lint errors == This information section shows results from scanning the page for [[Wikipedia:Linter|Lint errors]]. These are detected by the [[:mw:Help:Extension:Linter|Extension:Linter]] program. == Header and footer == When viewing page information, the wiki software can show additional custom text at the start and end of the page. The top of the information page (before the first section for "Basic information") comes from [[MediaWiki:Pageinfo-header]]. It is blank by default, but individual wikis can add content here. For example, on English Wikipedia, the header is used to create a table of contents. The bottom of the information can be customised via [[MediaWiki:Pageinfo-footer]]. It is blank by default but can be set at each wiki. For example, on English Wikipedia, it is used to create an additional section "External tools". {{Wikipedia technical help|collapsed}} [[Category:Wikipedia sidebar help]] [[Category:Wikipedia interface help]]

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia pages
revision.text:
{{Short description|Wikipedia information page}} {{pp-move-indef|small=yes}} '''Page information''' shows information about a page on Wikipedia. A link to "Page information" is in the Tools panel of the sidebar. On the mobile site, first click "Desktop" at the bottom, or add ?action=info to the URL. Registered users can also enable [[mw:Reading/Web/Advanced mobile contributions|advanced mode]] in [[Special:MobileOptions|mobile settings]] and then click on three dots. Some of the below fields only appear for pages where relevant information is available. ==Basic information== {| class="wikitable" |- ! Field !! Explanation !! Example for {{plain link|{{fullurl:Wikipedia:Sandbox|action=info}}|Wikipedia:Sandbox}} |- |[[WP:DISPLAYTITLE|Display title]] || See [[WP:DISPLAYTITLE]] || Wikipedia:Sandbox |- |[[Help:Defaultsort|Default sort key]] || See [[Help:Defaultsort]] || Sandbox |- |Page length (in bytes) || Size of page content (source text without [[Wikipedia:Transclusion|transclusions]]) in [[byte]]s || 440 |- |[[Wikipedia:Namespace#Programming|Namespace ID]] || The [[Wikipedia:Namespace#Programming|namespace number]] of the page || 4 |- |[[WP:Namespace|Namespace]] || Which [[WP:Namespace|namespace]] the page is in (omitted for articles) || Wikipedia |- |[[mw:Page id|Page ID]] || See [[mw:Page id]] || 16283969 |- |[[mw:Page content language|Page content language]] || See [[mw:Page content language]] || en - English |- |[[mw:Manual:ContentHandler|Page content model]] || Type of content (eg. wiki content, or program code like [[CSS]] or [[JavaScript]]).
See also [[mw:Manual:ContentHandler]] || wikitext |- |[[WP:NOINDEX|Indexing by robots]] || See [[WP:NOINDEX]]. || Allowed |- |[[Help:Watchlist|Number of page watchers]] || See [[Help:Watchlist#watchers]]. Precise number only given if above 30 (for security reasons). This count includes all accounts (blocked, inactive, etc.). || 18,081 |- |Number of page watchers who visited recent edits || Number of watchers who have visited any revision made [[mw:Manual:$wgWatchersMaxAge|30 days]] or less earlier than the most recent one. || 333 |- |colspan=2| Number of [[Help:Redirect|redirects]] to this page || 43 |- |[[:mw:Manual:$wgContentNamespaces|Counted as a content page]] || This says "Yes" for [[WP:MAINSPACE|mainspace]] pages (excluding redirects) and is omitted for other pages || |- |colspan=2|Number of [[Help:subpages|subpages]] of this page || 14 (8 redirects; 6 non-redirects) |- | [[Wikipedia:Pageview statistics|Page views]] in the past 30 days || {{plain link|url=https://pageviews.toolforge.org/?project=en.wikipedia.org|name=Page view statistics}} under "External tools" at the bottom is more detailed || 24,100 |- |colspan=2|[[Wikipedia:Wikidata|Wikidata]] item ID || [[wikidata:Q3938|Q3938]] |- |[[Wikipedia:Short description|Local description]] || Description on the local wiki (the English Wikipedia) || |- |[[:wikidata:Help:Description|Central description]] || Description on [[Wikipedia:Wikidata|Wikidata]] || page intended for test edits |- |[[:mw:Extension:PageImages|Page image]] || Image automatically selected by [[:mw:Extension:PageImages#Image choice]] to represent the page. Not always present. || [[File:Example.jpg|220px]] |} == Page protection == {| class="wikitable" |- ! Field !! Explanation !! Example for {{plain link|{{fullurl:Wikipedia:Sandbox|action=info}}|Wikipedia:Sandbox}} |- |[[WP:Protection policy|Edit]] || If the page is protected, this indicates what authorisation level is required for making changes. || ''Allow all users (no expiry set)'' |- |[[WP:Protection policy#Move protection|Move]] || If the page is protected, this indicates what authorisation level is required for moving (or renaming) the page. || ''Allow all users (no expiry set)'' |} == Edit history == {| class="wikitable" |- ! Field !! Explanation !! Example for {{plain link|{{fullurl:Wikipedia:Sandbox|action=info}}|Wikipedia:Sandbox}} |- |[[Wikipedia:How to create a page|Page creator]] || First user in the [[Help:Page history|page history]] || [[Wikipedia:User pages|Username]] ([[Help:Using talk pages|talk]] | [[Help:User contributions|contribs]]) |- |Date of page creation || Time is in [[UTC]]. Registered users may [[Help:Preferences#Time offset|set a time zone]]. || 01:44, 2 January 2006 |- |[[Help:Page history|Latest editor]] || || [[Wikipedia:User pages|Username]] ([[Help:Using talk pages|talk]] | [[Help:User contributions|contribs]]) |- |Date of latest edit || Time is in [[UTC]] || 04:09, 13 December 2015 |- |Total number of edits || || 670,900 |- |Recent number of edits (within past 30 days) || || 800 |- |Recent number of distinct authors || || 300 |} == Page properties == {| class="wikitable" |- ! Field !! Explanation !! Example for {{plain link|{{fullurl:Wikipedia:Sandbox|action=info}}|Wikipedia:Sandbox}} |- |[[Help:Magic words#Behavior switches|Magic words]] || If the page uses any behaviour switches, they are shown here | ''(None)'' |- ||[[WP:HIDDENCAT|Hidden categories]] || If the page is part of any hidden categories, they are shown here || ''(None)'' |- style="vertical-align: top;" |[[Wikipedia:Transclusion|Transcluded]] templates || Shows transcluded pages in all namespaces, not just [[Help:Template|templates]]. This list may be incomplete. For a complete list, click the "Edit" or "View source" tab and see "Pages transcluded onto the current version of this page" at the bottom | * [[Help:Template|Template]]:Also (edit) ([[WP:SEMI|semi-protected]]) * Template:See also (view source) ([[WP:TEMP-PRO|template protected]]) * [[Help:Module|Module]]:Arguments (view source) (template protected) * Module:Hatnote (view source) (template protected) * Module:See also (view source) (template protected) * Module:TableTools (view source) (template protected) |- style="vertical-align: top;" |[[wikidata:Wikidata:Glossary#Entity|Wikidata entities]] |Which [[WP:Wikidata|Wikidata]] entities were used to generate the page (usually by an [[Help:Infobox|infobox]] or other templates) | * Entity used in this page ** List of properties of those entities used in this page |} == Lint errors == This information section shows results from scanning the page for [[Wikipedia:Linter|Lint errors]]. These are detected by the [[:mw:Help:Extension:Linter|Extension:Linter]] program. == Header and footer == When viewing page information, the wiki software can show additional custom text at the start and end of the page. The top of the information page (before the first section for "Basic information") comes from [[MediaWiki:Pageinfo-header]]. It is blank by default, but individual wikis can add content here. For example, on English Wikipedia, the header is used to create a table of contents. The bottom of the information can be customised via [[MediaWiki:Pageinfo-footer]]. It is blank by default but can be set at each wiki. For example, on English Wikipedia, it is used to create an additional section "External tools". {{Wikipedia technical help|collapsed}} [[Category:Wikipedia sidebar help]] [[Category:Wikipedia interface help]]

{{Short description|Wikipedia information page}} {{pp-move-indef|small=yes}} '''Page information''' shows information about a page on Wikipedia. A link to "Page information" is in the Tools panel of the sidebar. On the mobile site, first click "Desktop" at the bottom, or add ?action=info to the URL. Registered users can also enable [[mw:Reading/Web/Advanced mobile contributions|advanced mode]] in [[Special:MobileOptions|mobile settings]] and then click on three dots. Some of the below fields only appear for pages where relevant information is available. ==Basic information== {| class="wikitable" |- ! Field !! Explanation !! Example for {{plain link|{{fullurl:Wikipedia:Sandbox|action=info}}|Wikipedia:Sandbox}} |- |[[WP:DISPLAYTITLE|Display title]] || See [[WP:DISPLAYTITLE]] || Wikipedia:Sandbox |- |[[Help:Defaultsort|Default sort key]] || See [[Help:Defaultsort]] || Sandbox |- |Page length (in bytes) || Size of page content (source text without [[Wikipedia:Transclusion|transclusions]]) in [[byte]]s || 440 |- |[[Wikipedia:Namespace#Programming|Namespace ID]] || The [[Wikipedia:Namespace#Programming|namespace number]] of the page || 4 |- |[[WP:Namespace|Namespace]] || Which [[WP:Namespace|namespace]] the page is in (omitted for articles) || Wikipedia |- |[[mw:Page id|Page ID]] || See [[mw:Page id]] || 16283969 |- |[[mw:Page content language|Page content language]] || See [[mw:Page content language]] || en - English |- |[[mw:Manual:ContentHandler|Page content model]] || Type of content (eg. wiki content, or program code like [[CSS]] or [[JavaScript]]).
See also [[mw:Manual:ContentHandler]] || wikitext |- |[[WP:NOINDEX|Indexing by robots]] || See [[WP:NOINDEX]]. || Allowed |- |[[Help:Watchlist|Number of page watchers]] || See [[Help:Watchlist#watchers]]. Precise number only given if above 30 (for security reasons). This count includes all accounts (blocked, inactive, etc.). || 18,081 |- |Number of page watchers who visited recent edits || Number of watchers who have visited any revision made [[mw:Manual:$wgWatchersMaxAge|30 days]] or less earlier than the most recent one. || 333 |- |colspan=2| Number of [[Help:Redirect|redirects]] to this page || 43 |- |[[:mw:Manual:$wgContentNamespaces|Counted as a content page]] || This says "Yes" for [[WP:NAMESPACE|mainspace]] pages (excluding redirects) and is omitted for other pages || |- |colspan=2|Number of [[Help:subpages|subpages]] of this page || 14 (8 redirects; 6 non-redirects) |- | [[Wikipedia:Pageview statistics|Page views]] in the past 30 days || {{plain link|url=https://pageviews.toolforge.org/?project=en.wikipedia.org|name=Page view statistics}} under "External tools" at the bottom is more detailed || 24,100 |- |colspan=2|[[Wikipedia:Wikidata|Wikidata]] item ID || [[wikidata:Q3938|Q3938]] |- |[[Wikipedia:Short description|Local description]] || Description on the local wiki (the English Wikipedia) || |- |[[:wikidata:Help:Description|Central description]] || Description on [[Wikipedia:Wikidata|Wikidata]] || page intended for test edits |- |[[:mw:Extension:PageImages|Page image]] || Image automatically selected by [[:mw:Extension:PageImages#Image choice]] to represent the page. Not always present. || [[File:Example.jpg|220px]] |} == Page protection == {| class="wikitable" |- ! Field !! Explanation !! Example for {{plain link|{{fullurl:Wikipedia:Sandbox|action=info}}|Wikipedia:Sandbox}} |- |[[WP:Protection policy|Edit]] || If the page is protected, this indicates what authorisation level is required for making changes. || ''Allow all users (no expiry set)'' |- |[[WP:Protection policy#Move protection|Move]] || If the page is protected, this indicates what authorisation level is required for moving (or renaming) the page. || ''Allow all users (no expiry set)'' |} == Edit history == {| class="wikitable" |- ! Field !! Explanation !! Example for {{plain link|{{fullurl:Wikipedia:Sandbox|action=info}}|Wikipedia:Sandbox}} |- |[[Wikipedia:How to create a page|Page creator]] || First user in the [[Help:Page history|page history]] || [[Wikipedia:User pages|Username]] ([[Help:Using talk pages|talk]] | [[Help:User contributions|contribs]]) |- |Date of page creation || Time is in [[UTC]]. Registered users may [[Help:Preferences#Time offset|set a time zone]]. || 01:44, 2 January 2006 |- |[[Help:Page history|Latest editor]] || || [[Wikipedia:User pages|Username]] ([[Help:Using talk pages|talk]] | [[Help:User contributions|contribs]]) |- |Date of latest edit || Time is in [[UTC]] || 04:09, 13 December 2015 |- |Total number of edits || || 670,900 |- |Recent number of edits (within past 30 days) || || 800 |- |Recent number of distinct authors || || 300 |} == Page properties == {| class="wikitable" |- ! Field !! Explanation !! Example for {{plain link|{{fullurl:Wikipedia:Sandbox|action=info}}|Wikipedia:Sandbox}} |- |[[Help:Magic words#Behavior switches|Magic words]] || If the page uses any behaviour switches, they are shown here | ''(None)'' |- ||[[WP:HIDDENCAT|Hidden categories]] || If the page is part of any hidden categories, they are shown here || ''(None)'' |- style="vertical-align: top;" |[[Wikipedia:Transclusion|Transcluded]] templates || Shows transcluded pages in all namespaces, not just [[Help:Template|templates]]. This list may be incomplete. For a complete list, click the "Edit" or "View source" tab and see "Pages transcluded onto the current version of this page" at the bottom | * [[Help:Template|Template]]:Also (edit) ([[WP:SEMI|semi-protected]]) * Template:See also (view source) ([[WP:TEMP-PRO|template protected]]) * [[Help:Module|Module]]:Arguments (view source) (template protected) * Module:Hatnote (view source) (template protected) * Module:See also (view source) (template protected) * Module:TableTools (view source) (template protected) |- style="vertical-align: top;" |[[wikidata:Wikidata:Glossary#Entity|Wikidata entities]] |Which [[WP:Wikidata|Wikidata]] entities were used to generate the page (usually by an [[Help:Infobox|infobox]] or other templates) | * Entity used in this page ** List of properties of those entities used in this page |} == Lint errors == This information section shows results from scanning the page for [[Wikipedia:Linter|Lint errors]]. These are detected by the [[:mw:Help:Extension:Linter|Extension:Linter]] program. == Header and footer == When viewing page information, the wiki software can show additional custom text at the start and end of the page. The top of the information page (before the first section for "Basic information") comes from [[MediaWiki:Pageinfo-header]]. It is blank by default, but individual wikis can add content here. For example, on English Wikipedia, the header is used to create a table of contents. The bottom of the information can be customised via [[MediaWiki:Pageinfo-footer]]. It is blank by default but can be set at each wiki. For example, on English Wikipedia, it is used to create an additional section "External tools". {{Wikipedia technical help|collapsed}} [[Category:Wikipedia sidebar help]] [[Category:Wikipedia interface help]]

{{Short description|Wikipedia information page}} {{pp-move-indef|small=yes}} '''Page information''' shows information about a page on Wikipedia. A link to "Page information" is in the Tools panel of the sidebar. On the mobile site, first click "Desktop" at the bottom, or add ?action=info to the URL. Registered users can also enable [[mw:Reading/Web/Advanced mobile contributions|advanced mode]] in [[Special:MobileOptions|mobile settings]] and then click on three dots. Some of the below fields only appear for pages where relevant information is available. ==Basic information== {| class="wikitable" |- ! Field !! Explanation !! Example for {{plain link|{{fullurl:Wikipedia:Sandbox|action=info}}|Wikipedia:Sandbox}} |- |[[WP:DISPLAYTITLE|Display title]] || See [[WP:DISPLAYTITLE]] || Wikipedia:Sandbox |- |[[Help:Defaultsort|Default sort key]] || See [[Help:Defaultsort]] || Sandbox |- |Page length (in bytes) || Size of page content (source text without [[Wikipedia:Transclusion|transclusions]]) in [[byte]]s || 440 |- |[[Wikipedia:Namespace#Programming|Namespace ID]] || The [[Wikipedia:Namespace#Programming|namespace number]] of the page || 4 |- |[[WP:Namespace|Namespace]] || Which [[WP:Namespace|namespace]] the page is in (omitted for articles) || Wikipedia |- |[[mw:Page id|Page ID]] || See [[mw:Page id]] || 16283969 |- |[[mw:Page content language|Page content language]] || See [[mw:Page content language]] || en - English |- |[[mw:Manual:ContentHandler|Page content model]] || Type of content (eg. wiki content, or program code like [[CSS]] or [[JavaScript]]).
See also [[mw:Manual:ContentHandler]] || wikitext |- |[[WP:NOINDEX|Indexing by robots]] || See [[WP:NOINDEX]]. || Allowed |- |[[Help:Watchlist|Number of page watchers]] || See [[Help:Watchlist#watchers]]. Precise number only given if above 30 (for security reasons). This count includes all accounts (blocked, inactive, etc.). || 18,081 |- |Number of page watchers who visited recent edits || Number of watchers who have visited any revision made [[mw:Manual:$wgWatchersMaxAge|30 days]] or less earlier than the most recent one. || 333 |- |colspan=2| Number of [[Help:Redirect|redirects]] to this page || 43 |- |[[:mw:Manual:$wgContentNamespaces|Counted as a content page]] || This says "Yes" for [[WP:NAMESPACE|mainspace]] pages (excluding redirects) and is omitted for other pages || |- |colspan=2|Number of [[Help:subpages|subpages]] of this page || 14 (8 redirects; 6 non-redirects) |- | [[Wikipedia:Pageview statistics|Page views]] in the past 30 days || {{plain link|url=https://pageviews.toolforge.org/?project=en.wikipedia.org|name=Page view statistics}} under "External tools" at the bottom is more detailed || 24,100 |- |colspan=2|[[Wikipedia:Wikidata|Wikidata]] item ID || [[wikidata:Q3938|Q3938]] |- |[[Wikipedia:Short description|Local description]] || Description on the local wiki (the English Wikipedia) || |- |[[:wikidata:Help:Description|Central description]] || Description on [[Wikipedia:Wikidata|Wikidata]] || page intended for test edits |- |[[:mw:Extension:PageImages|Page image]] || image automatically selected by [[:mw:Extension:PageImages#Image choice]] to represent the page. Not always present. || [[File:Example.jpg|220px]] |} == Page protection == {| class="wikitable" |- ! Field !! Explanation !! Example for {{plain link|{{fullurl:Wikipedia:Sandbox|action=info}}|Wikipedia:Sandbox}} |- |[[WP:Protection policy|Edit]] || If the page is protected, this indicates what authorisation level is required for making changes. || ''Allow all users (no expiry set)'' |- |[[WP:Protection policy#Move protection|Move]] || If the page is protected, this indicates what authorisation level is required for moving (or renaming) the page. || ''Allow all users (no expiry set)'' |} == Edit history == {| class="wikitable" |- ! Field !! Explanation !! Example for {{plain link|{{fullurl:Wikipedia:Sandbox|action=info}}|Wikipedia:Sandbox}} |- |[[Wikipedia:How to create a page|Page creator]] || First user in the [[Help:Page history|page history]] || [[Wikipedia:User pages|Username]] ([[Help:Using talk pages|talk]] | [[Help:User contributions|contribs]]) |- |Date of page creation || Time is in [[UTC]]. Registered users may [[Help:Preferences#Time offset|set a time zone]]. || 01:44, 2 January 2006 |- |[[Help:Page history|Latest editor]] || || [[Wikipedia:User pages|Username]] ([[Help:Using talk pages|talk]] | [[Help:User contributions|contribs]]) |- |Date of latest edit || Time is in [[UTC]] || 04:09, 13 December 2015 |- |Total number of edits || || 670,900 |- |Recent number of edits (within past 30 days) || || 800 |- |Recent number of distinct authors || || 300 |} == Page properties == {| class="wikitable" |- ! Field !! Explanation !! Example for {{plain link|{{fullurl:Wikipedia:Sandbox|action=info}}|Wikipedia:Sandbox}} |- |[[Help:Magic words#Behavior switches|Magic words]] || If the page uses any behaviour switches, they are shown here | ''(None)'' |- ||[[WP:HIDDENCAT|Hidden categories]] || If the page is part of any hidden categories, they are shown here || ''(None)'' |- style="vertical-align: top;" |[[Wikipedia:Transclusion|Transcluded]] templates || Shows transcluded pages in all namespaces, not just [[Help:Template|templates]]. This list may be incomplete. For a complete list, click the "Edit" or "View source" tab and see "Pages transcluded onto the current version of this page" at the bottom | * [[Help:Template|Template]]:Also (edit) ([[WP:SEMI|semi-protected]]) * Template:See also (view source) ([[WP:TEMP-PRO|template protected]]) * [[Help:Module|Module]]:Arguments (view source) (template protected) * Module:Hatnote (view source) (template protected) * Module:See also (view source) (template protected) * Module:TableTools (view source) (template protected) |- style="vertical-align: top;" |[[wikidata:Wikidata:Glossary#Entity|Wikidata entities]] |Which [[WP:Wikidata|Wikidata]] entities were used to generate the page (usually by an [[Help:Infobox|infobox]] or other templates) | * Entity used in this page ** List of properties of those entities used in this page |} == Lint errors == This information section shows results from scanning the page for [[Wikipedia:Linter|Lint errors]]. These are detected by the [[:mw:Help:Extension:Linter|Extension:Linter]] program. == Header and footer == When viewing page information, the wiki software can show additional custom text at the start and end of the page. The top of the information page (before the first section for "Basic information") comes from [[MediaWiki:Pageinfo-header]]. It is blank by default, but individual wikis can add content here. For example, on English Wikipedia, the header is used to create a table of contents. The bottom of the information can be customised via [[MediaWiki:Pageinfo-footer]]. It is blank by default but can be set at each wiki. For example, on English Wikipedia, it is used to create an additional section "External tools". {{Wikipedia technical help|collapsed}} [[Category:Wikipedia sidebar help]] [[Category:Wikipedia interface help]]

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Short description|Wikipedia information page}} {{pp-move-indef|small=yes}} '''Page information''' shows information about a page on Wikipedia. A link to "Page information" is in the Tools panel of the sidebar. On the mobile site, first click "Desktop" at the bottom, or add ?action=info to the URL. Registered users can also enable [[mw:Reading/Web/Advanced mobile contributions|advanced mode]] in [[Special:MobileOptions|mobile settings]] and then click on three dots. Some of the below fields only appear for pages where relevant information is available. ==Basic information== {| class="wikitable" |- ! Field !! Explanation !! Example for {{plain link|{{fullurl:Wikipedia:Sandbox|action=info}}|Wikipedia:Sandbox}} |- |[[WP:DISPLAYTITLE|Display title]] || See [[WP:DISPLAYTITLE]] || Wikipedia:Sandbox |- |[[Help:Defaultsort|Default sort key]] || See [[Help:Defaultsort]] || Sandbox |- |Page length (in bytes) || Size of page content (source text without [[Wikipedia:Transclusion|transclusions]]) in [[byte]]s || 440 |- |[[Wikipedia:Namespace#Programming|Namespace ID]] || The [[Wikipedia:Namespace#Programming|namespace number]] of the page || 4 |- |[[WP:Namespace|Namespace]] || Which [[WP:Namespace|namespace]] the page is in (omitted for articles) || Wikipedia |- |[[mw:Page id|Page ID]] || See [[mw:Page id]] || 16283969 |- |[[mw:Page content language|Page content language]] || See [[mw:Page content language]] || en - English |- |[[mw:Manual:ContentHandler|Page content model]] || Type of content (eg. wiki content, or program code like [[:en:CSS|CSS]] or [[JavaScript]]).
See also [[mw:Manual:ContentHandler]] || wikitext |- |[[WP:NOINDEX|Indexing by robots]] || See [[WP:NOINDEX]]. || Allowed |- |[[Help:Watchlist|Number of page watchers]] || See [[Help:Watchlist#watchers]]. Precise number only given if above 30 (for security reasons). This count includes all accounts (blocked, inactive, etc.). || 18,081 |- |Number of page watchers who visited recent edits || Number of watchers who have visited any revision made [[mw:Manual:$wgWatchersMaxAge|30 days]] or less earlier than the most recent one. || 333 |- |colspan=2| Number of [[Help:Redirect|redirects]] to this page || 43 |- |[[:mw:Manual:$wgContentNamespaces|Counted as a content page]] || This says "Yes" for [[WP:NAMESPACE|mainspace]] pages (excluding redirects) and is omitted for other pages || |- |colspan=2|Number of [[Help:subpages|subpages]] of this page || 14 (8 redirects; 6 non-redirects) |- | [[Wikipedia:Pageview statistics|Page views]] in the past 30 days || {{plain link|url=https://pageviews.toolforge.org/?project=en.wikipedia.org|name=Page view statistics}} under "External tools" at the bottom is more detailed || 24,100 |- |colspan=2|[[Wikipedia:Wikidata|Wikidata]] item ID || [[wikidata:Q3938|Q3938]] |- |[[Wikipedia:Short description|Local description]] || Description on the local wiki (the English Wikipedia) || |- |[[:wikidata:Help:Description|Central description]] || Description on [[Wikipedia:Wikidata|Wikidata]] || page intended for test edits |- |[[:mw:Extension:PageImages|Page image]] || image automatically selected by [[:mw:Extension:PageImages#Image choice]] to represent the page. Not always present. || [[File:Example.jpg|220px]] |} == Page protection == {| class="wikitable" |- ! Field !! Explanation !! Example for {{plain link|{{fullurl:Wikipedia:Sandbox|action=info}}|Wikipedia:Sandbox}} |- |[[WP:Protection policy|Edit]] || If the page is protected, this indicates what authorisation level is required for making changes. || ''Allow all users (no expiry set)'' |- |[[WP:Protection policy#Move protection|Move]] || If the page is protected, this indicates what authorisation level is required for moving (or renaming) the page. || ''Allow all users (no expiry set)'' |} == Edit history == {| class="wikitable" |- ! Field !! Explanation !! Example for {{plain link|{{fullurl:Wikipedia:Sandbox|action=info}}|Wikipedia:Sandbox}} |- |[[Wikipedia:How to create a page|Page creator]] || First user in the [[Help:Page history|page history]] || [[Wikipedia:User pages|Username]] ([[Help:Using talk pages|talk]] | [[Help:User contributions|contribs]]) |- |Date of page creation || Time is in [[UTC]]. Registered users may [[Help:Preferences#Time offset|set a time zone]]. || 01:44, 2 January 2006 |- |[[Help:Page history|Latest editor]] || || [[Wikipedia:User pages|Username]] ([[Help:Using talk pages|talk]] | [[Help:User contributions|contribs]]) |- |Date of latest edit || Time is in [[UTC]] || 04:09, 13 December 2015 |- |Total number of edits || || 670,900 |- |Recent number of edits (within past 30 days) || || 800 |- |Recent number of distinct authors || || 300 |} == Page properties == {| class="wikitable" |- ! Field !! Explanation !! Example for {{plain link|{{fullurl:Wikipedia:Sandbox|action=info}}|Wikipedia:Sandbox}} |- |[[Help:Magic words#Behavior switches|Magic words]] || If the page uses any behaviour switches, they are shown here | ''(None)'' |- ||[[WP:HIDDENCAT|Hidden categories]] || If the page is part of any hidden categories, they are shown here || ''(None)'' |- style="vertical-align: top;" |[[Wikipedia:Transclusion|Transcluded]] templates || Shows transcluded pages in all namespaces, not just [[Help:Template|templates]]. This list may be incomplete. For a complete list, click the "Edit" or "View source" tab and see "Pages transcluded onto the current version of this page" at the bottom | * [[Help:Template|Template]]:Also (edit) ([[WP:SEMI|semi-protected]]) * Template:See also (view source) ([[WP:TEMP-PRO|template protected]]) * [[Help:Module|Module]]:Arguments (view source) (template protected) * Module:Hatnote (view source) (template protected) * Module:See also (view source) (template protected) * Module:TableTools (view source) (template protected) |- style="vertical-align: top;" |[[wikidata:Wikidata:Glossary#Entity|Wikidata entities]] |Which [[WP:Wikidata|Wikidata]] entities were used to generate the page (usually by an [[Help:Infobox|infobox]] or other templates) | * Entity used in this page ** List of properties of those entities used in this page |} == Lint errors == This information section shows results from scanning the page for [[Wikipedia:Linter|Lint errors]]. These are detected by the [[:mw:Help:Extension:Linter|Extension:Linter]] program. == Header and footer == When viewing page information, the wiki software can show additional custom text at the start and end of the page. The top of the information page (before the first section for "Basic information") comes from [[MediaWiki:Pageinfo-header]]. It is blank by default, but individual wikis can add content here. For example, on English Wikipedia, the header is used to create a table of contents. The bottom of the information can be customised via [[MediaWiki:Pageinfo-footer]]. It is blank by default but can be set at each wiki. For example, on English Wikipedia, it is used to create an additional section "External tools". {{Wikipedia technical help|collapsed}} [[Category:Wikipedia sidebar help]] [[Category:Wikipedia interface help]]

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Short description|Wikipedia information page}} {{pp-move-indef|small=yes}} '''Page information''' shows information about a page on Wikipedia. A link to "Page information" is in the Tools panel of the sidebar. On the mobile site, first click "Desktop" at the bottom, or add ?action=info to the URL. Registered users can also enable [[mw:Reading/Web/Advanced mobile contributions|advanced mode]] in [[Special:MobileOptions|mobile settings]] and then click on three dots. Some of the below fields only appear for pages where relevant information is available. ==Basic information== {| class="wikitable" |- ! Field !! Explanation !! Example for {{plain link|{{fullurl:Wikipedia:Sandbox|action=info}}|Wikipedia:Sandbox}} |- |[[WP:DISPLAYTITLE|Display title]] || See [[WP:DISPLAYTITLE]] || Wikipedia:Sandbox |- |[[Help:Defaultsort|Default sort key]] || See [[Help:Defaultsort]] || Sandbox |- |Page length (in bytes) || Size of page content (source text without [[Wikipedia:Transclusion|transclusions]]) in [[:en:Byte|Byte]]s || 440 |- |[[Wikipedia:Namespace#Programming|Namespace ID]] || The [[Wikipedia:Namespace#Programming|namespace number]] of the page || 4 |- |[[WP:Namespace|Namespace]] || Which [[WP:Namespace|namespace]] the page is in (omitted for articles) || Wikipedia |- |[[mw:Page id|Page ID]] || See [[mw:Page id]] || 16283969 |- |[[mw:Page content language|Page content language]] || See [[mw:Page content language]] || en - English |- |[[mw:Manual:ContentHandler|Page content model]] || Type of content (eg. wiki content, or program code like [[:en:CSS|CSS]] or [[JavaScript]]).
See also [[mw:Manual:ContentHandler]] || wikitext |- |[[WP:NOINDEX|Indexing by robots]] || See [[WP:NOINDEX]]. || Allowed |- |[[Help:Watchlist|Number of page watchers]] || See [[Help:Watchlist#watchers]]. Precise number only given if above 30 (for security reasons). This count includes all accounts (blocked, inactive, etc.). || 18,081 |- |Number of page watchers who visited recent edits || Number of watchers who have visited any revision made [[mw:Manual:$wgWatchersMaxAge|30 days]] or less earlier than the most recent one. || 333 |- |colspan=2| Number of [[Help:Redirect|redirects]] to this page || 43 |- |[[:mw:Manual:$wgContentNamespaces|Counted as a content page]] || This says "Yes" for [[WP:NAMESPACE|mainspace]] pages (excluding redirects) and is omitted for other pages || |- |colspan=2|Number of [[Help:subpages|subpages]] of this page || 14 (8 redirects; 6 non-redirects) |- | [[Wikipedia:Pageview statistics|Page views]] in the past 30 days || {{plain link|url=https://pageviews.toolforge.org/?project=en.wikipedia.org|name=Page view statistics}} under "External tools" at the bottom is more detailed || 24,100 |- |colspan=2|[[Wikipedia:Wikidata|Wikidata]] item ID || [[wikidata:Q3938|Q3938]] |- |[[Wikipedia:Short description|Local description]] || Description on the local wiki (the English Wikipedia) || |- |[[:wikidata:Help:Description|Central description]] || Description on [[Wikipedia:Wikidata|Wikidata]] || page intended for test edits |- |[[:mw:Extension:PageImages|Page image]] || image automatically selected by [[:mw:Extension:PageImages#Image choice]] to represent the page. Not always present. || [[File:Example.jpg|220px]] |} == Page protection == {| class="wikitable" |- ! Field !! Explanation !! Example for {{plain link|{{fullurl:Wikipedia:Sandbox|action=info}}|Wikipedia:Sandbox}} |- |[[WP:Protection policy|Edit]] || If the page is protected, this indicates what authorisation level is required for making changes. || ''Allow all users (no expiry set)'' |- |[[WP:Protection policy#Move protection|Move]] || If the page is protected, this indicates what authorisation level is required for moving (or renaming) the page. || ''Allow all users (no expiry set)'' |} == Edit history == {| class="wikitable" |- ! Field !! Explanation !! Example for {{plain link|{{fullurl:Wikipedia:Sandbox|action=info}}|Wikipedia:Sandbox}} |- |[[Wikipedia:How to create a page|Page creator]] || First user in the [[Help:Page history|page history]] || [[Wikipedia:User pages|Username]] ([[Help:Using talk pages|talk]] | [[Help:User contributions|contribs]]) |- |Date of page creation || Time is in [[UTC]]. Registered users may [[Help:Preferences#Time offset|set a time zone]]. || 01:44, 2 January 2006 |- |[[Help:Page history|Latest editor]] || || [[Wikipedia:User pages|Username]] ([[Help:Using talk pages|talk]] | [[Help:User contributions|contribs]]) |- |Date of latest edit || Time is in [[UTC]] || 04:09, 13 December 2015 |- |Total number of edits || || 670,900 |- |Recent number of edits (within past 30 days) || || 800 |- |Recent number of distinct authors || || 300 |} == Page properties == {| class="wikitable" |- ! Field !! Explanation !! Example for {{plain link|{{fullurl:Wikipedia:Sandbox|action=info}}|Wikipedia:Sandbox}} |- |[[Help:Magic words#Behavior switches|Magic words]] || If the page uses any behaviour switches, they are shown here | ''(None)'' |- ||[[WP:HIDDENCAT|Hidden categories]] || If the page is part of any hidden categories, they are shown here || ''(None)'' |- style="vertical-align: top;" |[[Wikipedia:Transclusion|Transcluded]] templates || Shows transcluded pages in all namespaces, not just [[Help:Template|templates]]. This list may be incomplete. For a complete list, click the "Edit" or "View source" tab and see "Pages transcluded onto the current version of this page" at the bottom | * [[Help:Template|Template]]:Also (edit) ([[WP:SEMI|semi-protected]]) * Template:See also (view source) ([[WP:TEMP-PRO|template protected]]) * [[Help:Module|Module]]:Arguments (view source) (template protected) * Module:Hatnote (view source) (template protected) * Module:See also (view source) (template protected) * Module:TableTools (view source) (template protected) |- style="vertical-align: top;" |[[wikidata:Wikidata:Glossary#Entity|Wikidata entities]] |Which [[WP:Wikidata|Wikidata]] entities were used to generate the page (usually by an [[Help:Infobox|infobox]] or other templates) | * Entity used in this page ** List of properties of those entities used in this page |} == Lint errors == This information section shows results from scanning the page for [[Wikipedia:Linter|Lint errors]]. These are detected by the [[:mw:Help:Extension:Linter|Extension:Linter]] program. == Header and footer == When viewing page information, the wiki software can show additional custom text at the start and end of the page. The top of the information page (before the first section for "Basic information") comes from [[MediaWiki:Pageinfo-header]]. It is blank by default, but individual wikis can add content here. For example, on English Wikipedia, the header is used to create a table of contents. The bottom of the information can be customised via [[MediaWiki:Pageinfo-footer]]. It is blank by default but can be set at each wiki. For example, on English Wikipedia, it is used to create an additional section "External tools". {{Wikipedia technical help|collapsed}} [[Category:Wikipedia sidebar help]] [[Category:Wikipedia interface help]]

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Short description|Wikipedia information page}} {{pp-move-indef|small=yes}} '''Page information''' shows information about a page on Wikipedia. A link to "Page information" is in the Tools panel of the sidebar. On the mobile site, first click "Desktop" at the bottom, or add ?action=info to the URL. Registered users can also enable [[mw:Reading/Web/Advanced mobile contributions|advanced mode]] in [[Special:MobileOptions|mobile settings]] and then click on three dots. Some of the below fields only appear for pages where relevant information is available. ==Basic information== {| class="wikitable" |- ! Field !! Explanation !! Example for {{plain link|{{fullurl:Wikipedia:Sandbox|action=info}}|Wikipedia:Sandbox}} |- |[[WP:DISPLAYTITLE|Display title]] || See [[WP:DISPLAYTITLE]] || Wikipedia:Sandbox |- |[[Help:Defaultsort|Default sort key]] || See [[Help:Defaultsort]] || Sandbox |- |Page length (in bytes) || Size of page content (source text without [[Wikipedia:Transclusion|transclusions]]) in [[:en:Byte|Byte]]s || 440 |- |[[Wikipedia:Namespace#Programming|Namespace ID]] || The [[Wikipedia:Namespace#Programming|namespace number]] of the page || 4 |- |[[WP:Namespace|Namespace]] || Which [[WP:Namespace|namespace]] the page is in (omitted for articles) || Wikipedia |- |[[mw:Page id|Page ID]] || See [[mw:Page id]] || 16283969 |- |[[mw:Page content language|Page content language]] || See [[mw:Page content language]] || en - English |- |[[mw:Manual:ContentHandler|Page content model]] || Type of content (eg. wiki content, or program code like [[:en:CSS|CSS]] or [[:en:JavaScript|JavaScript]]).
See also [[mw:Manual:ContentHandler]] || wikitext |- |[[WP:NOINDEX|Indexing by robots]] || See [[WP:NOINDEX]]. || Allowed |- |[[Help:Watchlist|Number of page watchers]] || See [[Help:Watchlist#watchers]]. Precise number only given if above 30 (for security reasons). This count includes all accounts (blocked, inactive, etc.). || 18,081 |- |Number of page watchers who visited recent edits || Number of watchers who have visited any revision made [[mw:Manual:$wgWatchersMaxAge|30 days]] or less earlier than the most recent one. || 333 |- |colspan=2| Number of [[Help:Redirect|redirects]] to this page || 43 |- |[[:mw:Manual:$wgContentNamespaces|Counted as a content page]] || This says "Yes" for [[WP:NAMESPACE|mainspace]] pages (excluding redirects) and is omitted for other pages || |- |colspan=2|Number of [[Help:subpages|subpages]] of this page || 14 (8 redirects; 6 non-redirects) |- | [[Wikipedia:Pageview statistics|Page views]] in the past 30 days || {{plain link|url=https://pageviews.toolforge.org/?project=en.wikipedia.org|name=Page view statistics}} under "External tools" at the bottom is more detailed || 24,100 |- |colspan=2|[[Wikipedia:Wikidata|Wikidata]] item ID || [[wikidata:Q3938|Q3938]] |- |[[Wikipedia:Short description|Local description]] || Description on the local wiki (the English Wikipedia) || |- |[[:wikidata:Help:Description|Central description]] || Description on [[Wikipedia:Wikidata|Wikidata]] || page intended for test edits |- |[[:mw:Extension:PageImages|Page image]] || image automatically selected by [[:mw:Extension:PageImages#Image choice]] to represent the page. Not always present. || [[File:Example.jpg|220px]] |} == Page protection == {| class="wikitable" |- ! Field !! Explanation !! Example for {{plain link|{{fullurl:Wikipedia:Sandbox|action=info}}|Wikipedia:Sandbox}} |- |[[WP:Protection policy|Edit]] || If the page is protected, this indicates what authorisation level is required for making changes. || ''Allow all users (no expiry set)'' |- |[[WP:Protection policy#Move protection|Move]] || If the page is protected, this indicates what authorisation level is required for moving (or renaming) the page. || ''Allow all users (no expiry set)'' |} == Edit history == {| class="wikitable" |- ! Field !! Explanation !! Example for {{plain link|{{fullurl:Wikipedia:Sandbox|action=info}}|Wikipedia:Sandbox}} |- |[[Wikipedia:How to create a page|Page creator]] || First user in the [[Help:Page history|page history]] || [[Wikipedia:User pages|Username]] ([[Help:Using talk pages|talk]] | [[Help:User contributions|contribs]]) |- |Date of page creation || Time is in [[UTC]]. Registered users may [[Help:Preferences#Time offset|set a time zone]]. || 01:44, 2 January 2006 |- |[[Help:Page history|Latest editor]] || || [[Wikipedia:User pages|Username]] ([[Help:Using talk pages|talk]] | [[Help:User contributions|contribs]]) |- |Date of latest edit || Time is in [[UTC]] || 04:09, 13 December 2015 |- |Total number of edits || || 670,900 |- |Recent number of edits (within past 30 days) || || 800 |- |Recent number of distinct authors || || 300 |} == Page properties == {| class="wikitable" |- ! Field !! Explanation !! Example for {{plain link|{{fullurl:Wikipedia:Sandbox|action=info}}|Wikipedia:Sandbox}} |- |[[Help:Magic words#Behavior switches|Magic words]] || If the page uses any behaviour switches, they are shown here | ''(None)'' |- ||[[WP:HIDDENCAT|Hidden categories]] || If the page is part of any hidden categories, they are shown here || ''(None)'' |- style="vertical-align: top;" |[[Wikipedia:Transclusion|Transcluded]] templates || Shows transcluded pages in all namespaces, not just [[Help:Template|templates]]. This list may be incomplete. For a complete list, click the "Edit" or "View source" tab and see "Pages transcluded onto the current version of this page" at the bottom | * [[Help:Template|Template]]:Also (edit) ([[WP:SEMI|semi-protected]]) * Template:See also (view source) ([[WP:TEMP-PRO|template protected]]) * [[Help:Module|Module]]:Arguments (view source) (template protected) * Module:Hatnote (view source) (template protected) * Module:See also (view source) (template protected) * Module:TableTools (view source) (template protected) |- style="vertical-align: top;" |[[wikidata:Wikidata:Glossary#Entity|Wikidata entities]] |Which [[WP:Wikidata|Wikidata]] entities were used to generate the page (usually by an [[Help:Infobox|infobox]] or other templates) | * Entity used in this page ** List of properties of those entities used in this page |} == Lint errors == This information section shows results from scanning the page for [[Wikipedia:Linter|Lint errors]]. These are detected by the [[:mw:Help:Extension:Linter|Extension:Linter]] program. == Header and footer == When viewing page information, the wiki software can show additional custom text at the start and end of the page. The top of the information page (before the first section for "Basic information") comes from [[MediaWiki:Pageinfo-header]]. It is blank by default, but individual wikis can add content here. For example, on English Wikipedia, the header is used to create a table of contents. The bottom of the information can be customised via [[MediaWiki:Pageinfo-footer]]. It is blank by default but can be set at each wiki. For example, on English Wikipedia, it is used to create an additional section "External tools". {{Wikipedia technical help|collapsed}} [[Category:Wikipedia sidebar help]] [[Category:Wikipedia interface help]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Short description|Wikipedia information page}} {{pp-move-indef|small=yes}} '''Page information''' shows information about a page on Wikipedia. A link to "Page information" is in the Tools panel of the sidebar. On the mobile site, first click "Desktop" at the bottom, or add ?action=info to the URL. Registered users can also enable [[mw:Reading/Web/Advanced mobile contributions|advanced mode]] in [[Special:MobileOptions|mobile settings]] and then click on three dots. Some of the below fields only appear for pages where relevant information is available. ==Basic information== {| class="wikitable" |- ! Field !! Explanation !! Example for {{plain link|{{fullurl:Wikipedia:Sandbox|action=info}}|Wikipedia:Sandbox}} |- |[[WP:DISPLAYTITLE|Display title]] || See [[WP:DISPLAYTITLE]] || Wikipedia:Sandbox |- |[[Help:Defaultsort|Default sort key]] || See [[Help:Defaultsort]] || Sandbox |- |Page length (in bytes) || Size of page content (source text without [[Wikipedia:Transclusion|transclusions]]) in [[:en:Byte|Byte]]s || 440 |- |[[Wikipedia:Namespace#Programming|Namespace ID]] || The [[Wikipedia:Namespace#Programming|namespace number]] of the page || 4 |- |[[WP:Namespace|Namespace]] || Which [[WP:Namespace|namespace]] the page is in (omitted for articles) || Wikipedia |- |[[mw:Page id|Page ID]] || See [[mw:Page id]] || 16283969 |- |[[mw:Page content language|Page content language]] || See [[mw:Page content language]] || en - English |- |[[mw:Manual:ContentHandler|Page content model]] || Type of content (eg. wiki content, or program code like [[:en:CSS|CSS]] or [[:en:JavaScript|JavaScript]]).
See also [[mw:Manual:ContentHandler]] || wikitext |- |[[WP:NOINDEX|Indexing by robots]] || See [[WP:NOINDEX]]. || Allowed |- |[[Help:Watchlist|Number of page watchers]] || See [[Help:Watchlist#watchers]]. Precise number only given if above 30 (for security reasons). This count includes all accounts (blocked, inactive, etc.). || 18,081 |- |Number of page watchers who visited recent edits || Number of watchers who have visited any revision made [[mw:Manual:$wgWatchersMaxAge|30 days]] or less earlier than the most recent one. || 333 |- |colspan=2| Number of [[Help:Redirect|redirects]] to this page || 43 |- |[[:mw:Manual:$wgContentNamespaces|Counted as a content page]] || This says "Yes" for [[WP:NAMESPACE|mainspace]] pages (excluding redirects) and is omitted for other pages || |- |colspan=2|Number of [[Help:subpages|subpages]] of this page || 14 (8 redirects; 6 non-redirects) |- | [[Wikipedia:Pageview statistics|Page views]] in the past 30 days || {{plain link|url=https://pageviews.toolforge.org/?project=en.wikipedia.org|name=Page view statistics}} under "External tools" at the bottom is more detailed || 24,100 |- |colspan=2|[[Wikipedia:Wikidata|Wikidata]] item ID || [[wikidata:Q3938|Q3938]] |- |[[Wikipedia:Short description|Local description]] || Description on the local wiki (the English Wikipedia) || |- |[[:wikidata:Help:Description|Central description]] || Description on [[Wikipedia:Wikidata|Wikidata]] || page intended for test edits |- |[[:mw:Extension:PageImages|Page image]] || image automatically selected by [[:mw:Extension:PageImages#Image choice]] to represent the page. Not always present. || [[File:Example.jpg|220px]] |} == Page protection == {| class="wikitable" |- ! Field !! Explanation !! Example for {{plain link|{{fullurl:Wikipedia:Sandbox|action=info}}|Wikipedia:Sandbox}} |- |[[WP:Protection policy|Edit]] || If the page is protected, this indicates what authorisation level is required for making changes. || ''Allow all users (no expiry set)'' |- |[[WP:Protection policy#Move protection|Move]] || If the page is protected, this indicates what authorisation level is required for moving (or renaming) the page. || ''Allow all users (no expiry set)'' |} == Edit history == {| class="wikitable" |- ! Field !! Explanation !! Example for {{plain link|{{fullurl:Wikipedia:Sandbox|action=info}}|Wikipedia:Sandbox}} |- |[[Wikipedia:How to create a page|Page creator]] || First user in the [[Help:Page history|page history]] || [[Wikipedia:User pages|Username]] ([[Help:Using talk pages|talk]] | [[Help:User contributions|contribs]]) |- |Date of page creation || Time is in [[:en:UTC|UTC]]. Registered users may [[Help:Preferences#Time offset|set a time zone]]. || 01:44, 2 January 2006 |- |[[Help:Page history|Latest editor]] || || [[Wikipedia:User pages|Username]] ([[Help:Using talk pages|talk]] | [[Help:User contributions|contribs]]) |- |Date of latest edit || Time is in [[:en:UTC|UTC]] || 04:09, 13 December 2015 |- |Total number of edits || || 670,900 |- |Recent number of edits (within past 30 days) || || 800 |- |Recent number of distinct authors || || 300 |} == Page properties == {| class="wikitable" |- ! Field !! Explanation !! Example for {{plain link|{{fullurl:Wikipedia:Sandbox|action=info}}|Wikipedia:Sandbox}} |- |[[Help:Magic words#Behavior switches|Magic words]] || If the page uses any behaviour switches, they are shown here | ''(None)'' |- ||[[WP:HIDDENCAT|Hidden categories]] || If the page is part of any hidden categories, they are shown here || ''(None)'' |- style="vertical-align: top;" |[[Wikipedia:Transclusion|Transcluded]] templates || Shows transcluded pages in all namespaces, not just [[Help:Template|templates]]. This list may be incomplete. For a complete list, click the "Edit" or "View source" tab and see "Pages transcluded onto the current version of this page" at the bottom | * [[Help:Template|Template]]:Also (edit) ([[WP:SEMI|semi-protected]]) * Template:See also (view source) ([[WP:TEMP-PRO|template protected]]) * [[Help:Module|Module]]:Arguments (view source) (template protected) * Module:Hatnote (view source) (template protected) * Module:See also (view source) (template protected) * Module:TableTools (view source) (template protected) |- style="vertical-align: top;" |[[wikidata:Wikidata:Glossary#Entity|Wikidata entities]] |Which [[WP:Wikidata|Wikidata]] entities were used to generate the page (usually by an [[Help:Infobox|infobox]] or other templates) | * Entity used in this page ** List of properties of those entities used in this page |} == Lint errors == This information section shows results from scanning the page for [[Wikipedia:Linter|Lint errors]]. These are detected by the [[:mw:Help:Extension:Linter|Extension:Linter]] program. == Header and footer == When viewing page information, the wiki software can show additional custom text at the start and end of the page. The top of the information page (before the first section for "Basic information") comes from [[MediaWiki:Pageinfo-header]]. It is blank by default, but individual wikis can add content here. For example, on English Wikipedia, the header is used to create a table of contents. The bottom of the information can be customised via [[MediaWiki:Pageinfo-footer]]. It is blank by default but can be set at each wiki. For example, on English Wikipedia, it is used to create an additional section "External tools". {{Wikipedia technical help|collapsed}} [[Category:Wikipedia sidebar help]] [[Category:Wikipedia interface help]]
